title: Post-M8 responsive windowed and fullscreen layout gate
summary: Make the player HUD, map and panels responsive across the required viewport matrix in zh-CN and en with no critical clipping or overlap.
acceptance: Runs windowed/fullscreen-equivalent checks in zh-CN and en
Map remains inspectable; panels do not incoherently cover the play surface at required sizes
Long labels wrap or move into stable scroll regions without causing overlap
Stores screenshot or DOM-layout artifacts for reviewer inspection

history.details: Implemented medium responsive player HUD layout, map-focus assertions and WM-0135 DOM layout artifact; supported responsive/full web-shell E2E and quality gates passed; legacy task command shapes recorded as unsupported.

verified: No blocking findings; required en/zh-CN viewport matrix and DOM artifact confirmed, medium/desktop layout modes preserve map-focus evidence with stable scroll regions, scope stays UI/E2E/report/task only, and unsupported command-shape deviations are accurately recorded with supported responsive E2E/full web-shell/typecheck/quality passes.
Verified responsive layout gate integrated after handoff/task validation, diff check and full quality gate passed; reviewer verdict confirmed no blocking findings.

forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes

review.summary: No blocking findings; required en/zh-CN viewport matrix and DOM artifact confirmed, medium/desktop layout modes preserve map-focus evidence with stable scroll regions, scope stays UI/E2E/report/task only, and unsupported command-shape deviations are accurately recorded with supported responsive E2E/full web-shell/typecheck/quality passes.

integration.summary: Verified responsive layout gate integrated after handoff/task validation, diff check and full quality gate passed; reviewer verdict confirmed no blocking findings.
